creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 251946
patch

>diff -r -u net/smcroute/Makefile net/smcroute/Makefile
>--- net/smcroute/Makefile	2024-03-21 13:37:00.751981000 +0100
>+++ net/smcroute/Makefile	2024-07-09 09:27:20.322104000 +0200
>@@ -1,6 +1,5 @@
> PORTNAME=	smcroute
>-PORTVERSION=	2.1.0
>-PORTREVISION=	1
>+PORTVERSION=	2.5.7
> CATEGORIES=	net
> 
> MAINTAINER=	hrs@FreeBSD.org
>@@ -19,7 +18,7 @@
> GNU_CONFIGURE_MANPREFIX=	${PREFIX}/share
> CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--bindir=${PREFIX}/sbin
> INSTALL_TARGET=	install-exec-am install-man
>-PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS COPYING ChangeLog README TODO
>+PORTDOCS=	COPYING
> 
> OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
> DOCS_INSTALL_TARGET=	install
>diff -r -u net/smcroute/distinfo net/smcroute/distinfo
>--- net/smcroute/distinfo	2024-01-01 12:02:51.614419000 +0100
>+++ net/smcroute/distinfo	2024-07-09 07:12:14.886925000 +0200
>@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
>-TIMESTAMP = 1465680746
>-SHA256 (troglobit-smcroute-2.1.0_GH0.tar.gz) = 1b0b625e3645b1bce42c257d1541c85c8a15d763f38cf8892563b6c5696d89ee
>-SIZE (troglobit-smcroute-2.1.0_GH0.tar.gz) = 43402
>+TIMESTAMP = 1720501934
>+SHA256 (troglobit-smcroute-2.5.7_GH0.tar.gz) = 5963f9383564c641eb81be41d3b6743339adb415a252bed1945ad0f9e53bdd52
>+SIZE (troglobit-smcroute-2.5.7_GH0.tar.gz) = 173116
>Only in pp/net/smcroute/files: patch-Makefile.am
>Only in pp/net/smcroute/files: patch-ipc.c
>Only in pp/net/smcroute/files: patch-mcgroup.c
>Only in pp/net/smcroute/files: patch-mroute-api.c
>Only in g/net/smcroute/files: patch-mroute.h
>diff -r -u net/smcroute/pkg-plist net/smcroute/pkg-plist
>--- net/smcroute/pkg-plist	2024-03-21 13:37:00.752061000 +0100
>+++ net/smcroute/pkg-plist	2024-07-09 07:49:50.621503000 +0200
>@@ -1,3 +1,9 @@
> sbin/smcroute
>+sbin/smcroutectl
>+sbin/smcrouted
>+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README.md
>+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/smcroute.conf
>+share/man/man5/smcroute.conf.5.gz
>+share/man/man8/smcroutectl.8.gz
>+share/man/man8/smcrouted.8.gz
> @sample etc/smcroute.conf.sample
>-share/man/man8/smcroute.8.gz
